title.en: Reporting to Authorized Individuals or Roles

prose.en: Verify that the system is configured so that data or information collected by the {param:sc-42.01_odp} is only reported to authorized individuals or roles.

guidance.en: In situations where sensors are activated by authorized individuals, it is still possible that the data or information collected by the sensors will be sent to unauthorized entities.

prose.en: the system is configured so that data or information collected by the {param:sc-42.01_odp} is only reported to authorized individuals or roles.

objects.en: procedures addressing sensor capability and data collection
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
organizational personnel responsible for the sensor capabilities
Mechanisms restricting the reporting of sensor information to those authorized
sensor data collection and reporting capabilities for the system

guidelines.en: sensors to be used to collect data or information are defined;
